subject: feat(theme): migrate LayoutTab, MediaTab, PlatformPreview, ExportButtons to DaisyUI
body:
Final batch of component migrations. LayoutTab indigo classes mapped to
DaisyUI secondary tokens. MediaTab violet/red classes mapped to
primary/error. PlatformPreview and ExportButtons semantic UI tokens
replaced with DaisyUI base-content/base-* equivalents. All dark: class
pairs removed — DaisyUI handles light/dark automatically via data-theme.

Tags: theme, daisyui, components, migration
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: major

https://claude.ai/code/session_01QDdpPbsw1PaMMrwihoc5hG
